summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Fleet OS Enterprise Web Platform MVP. All core modules tested successfully including authentication, dashboard, fleet management, driver management, client management, duty lifecycle (CRITICAL), and billing system.
passed_tests: Dashboard stats display (vehicles, drivers, duties, invoices, revenue)
Fleet Management CRUD (add, view, edit vehicles with status badges)
Driver Management CRUD (add, view drivers with status display)
Client Management CRUD (add, view clients with GSTIN)
Duty Management CRITICAL lifecycle (CREATED → ASSIGNED → ACCEPTED → STARTED → COMPLETED)
Swiss design aesthetic compliance (status colors, typography, layout)
All backend API endpoints (29/29 tests passed)
Frontend UI integration with backend APIs
Status badge color coding per design guidelines
